details.snapshot: A full-stack portfolio site with a public project library, login-protected admin area, and editable project detail pages.
details.purposeText: This project gives my coursework and independent builds a structured place to live. It is designed to show not only finished outputs, but also the reasoning, process, and reflection behind each project.
details.approach: Built with dependency-free Node.js, static HTML/CSS, client-side rendering, and a small JSON-backed admin workflow for managing projects.
details.outcome: The portfolio now supports public project cards, filtering, admin-created entries, and individual detail pages that can explain each project in more depth.
details.nextSteps: Refine the detail-page writing, add editing support for existing projects, and expand the backend once the final content structure is settled.

title: EPL Predictor Model
description: Linear regression ML model for predicting Premier League table standings.

details.snapshot: A machine learning project exploring regression-based prediction for Premier League table standings.
details.purposeText: The purpose of this project is to strengthen applied machine learning skills by connecting football data, feature selection, regression modelling, and result interpretation.
details.approach: Prepare historical football data, choose relevant features, train regression models, and compare predicted standings against known outcomes.
details.outcome: The project demonstrates how statistical features can be transformed into a predictive model and evaluated against a real-world sports problem.
details.nextSteps: Test more feature combinations, compare alternative algorithms, and document the model limitations more clearly.

title: Netflix Analysis
description: Data analysis and visualization of Netflix content and viewer behaviour.

details.snapshot: A data analysis project exploring Netflix content trends through cleaning, grouping, and visualisation.
details.purposeText: This project practises exploratory data analysis by using a familiar entertainment dataset to ask clearer questions about content, genres, and release patterns.
details.approach: Clean the dataset, inspect missing values, group by useful attributes, and create charts that make content patterns easier to understand.
details.outcome: The analysis demonstrates data cleaning, summarisation, and visual storytelling with Python libraries.
details.nextSteps: Add stronger narrative conclusions, improve chart polish, and explore interactive visualisations.

title: Weather Data Analysis
description: Analysis and visualization of weather patterns and climate data.

details.snapshot: A weather data analysis project focused on identifying and visualising climate and weather patterns.
details.purposeText: This project helps practise working with time-based environmental data, turning raw measurements into clearer trends and visual explanations.
details.approach: Prepare weather records, inspect trends, and create visualisations that communicate changes across time and conditions.
details.outcome: The project shows data preparation, exploratory analysis, and chart-based explanation using Python.
details.nextSteps: Add more robust time-series comparisons, explore seasonal patterns, and refine the final visual story.
